name: MIL
description: MIL Token is the native utility token of Millionero, designed to power the exchange ecosystem and reward active participants. MIL unlocks reduced trading fees, exclusive platform benefits, loyalty rewards, and future ecosystem utilities while aligning user incentives with the long-term growth of Millionero. Built to support sustainable exchange operations, MIL plays a central role in enhancing user engagement, liquidity, and platform value.
